=== standalone
# HDivider not connected to outer border — floats inside the window.
widget: hdivider
title: Divider
width: 20
height: 3
===
╔═ Divider ════════╗
║──────────────────║
╚══════════════════╝

=== connected
# HDivider with Connected: true — junction chars meet the outer border.
widget: hdivider
title: Divider
width: 20
height: 3
connected: true
===
╔═ Divider ════════╗
╟──────────────────╢
╚══════════════════╝
